[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: AI Agent (software & documentation)
- Amount: 0
- Description: DApp Stores Nearby + Store Interaction History operator UX
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/169
  
  Details:
  **GitHub**
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/169
  
  **Time attributed:** 20 minutes (operator estimate for this session).
  
  **What changed**
  - **Stores Nearby** (`stores_nearby.html`): After a successful Hit List `update_status`, the UI shows **Open interaction history** with context that the nearby list is not re-fetched (scroll-friendly). Merged PR adds `target="_blank"` and `rel="noopener noreferrer"` on that link so the map/list tab stays open.
  - **Store Interaction History** (`store_interaction_history.html`): Help text clarifies updates are **text fields only**, **photo attachments are not supported**, and this flow does **not** go through Edgar (`sentiment_importer`).
  
  **Why**
  - Improve field workflow: move detailed verification to the history page without forcing a disruptive list refresh on Stores Nearby; park business-card images until a future design.
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 0
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
